title: Social Media Coordinator
description: Lockheed Martin is seeking a Social Media Coordinator to manage our communications across social platforms. You'll create content, engage with audiences, and support our brand voice in the defense and aerospace sector. This remote role offers the opportunity to develop marketing and communications expertise with a Fortune 500 company.
responsibilities: Create and schedule social media content across LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram
Monitor social media channels; respond to inquiries and engage with audiences
Analyze social media metrics and performance; prepare reports for management
Collaborate with marketing and communications teams on campaign strategy
Support brand reputation management and crisis communication protocols

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
skills: Proficiency with social media platforms and management tools
Strong written communication and storytelling abilities
Content creation and basic graphic design skills
Understanding of social media trends and best practices

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
